---

## 📖 Documentation Issue
Describe what documentation is missing or unclear.

## 🔗 Related Link
Link to the documentation page or section.

## 🎯 What Should Be Documented
Describe what information should be added or clarified.

## 💡 Suggested Improvement
Provide any suggestions for how to improve the documentation.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I've checked existing documentation
- [ ] This is not covered elsewhere
- [ ] I have specific suggestions
